indicators.name: Soft lighting
indicators.rationale: The soft lighting creates a calming atmosphere conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: Neutral colors
indicators.rationale: The neutral color palette of the bathroom helps create a calm and relaxing environment.

indicators.name: Large bathtub
indicators.rationale: The large bathtub provides ample space for relaxation, which can aid in sleep.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is ideally suited for sleep (primary) due to its calming atmosphere, neutral color palette, and ample space for relaxation.
